posts.text: Both leaders declared the visit a success. Yet, several hours after the departure of America’s president, it was still unclear if the two sides had achieved the goal of extending a year-long truce in their trade war https://www.economist.com/china/2026/05/15/what-did-trump-and-xi-actually-achieve?taid=6a080331717bd400015f3172&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
posts.author: TheEconomist

posts.text:
Turns out, we didn't sell them any soybeans, and didn't get a BYD plant in Alabama😢. 

In fact, Trump and Xi had so little to discuss, that they toured a former imperial garden to kill time and pretend like they had something in common...
posts.author: hkuppy
